zh.Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria: 保加利亞Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃
zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich於1210年出生在波蘭吉喬福斯吉Київ時，他的父親Michael of Chernigov31歲，母親Olena Maria Romanova16歲。他和Princess Anna of Hungary至少有5個兒子和8個女兒。他去世於1264年在匈牙利享年54歲。

zh-hans.Veliko Turnovo, Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria: 保加利亚Велико Търново維利可 騰諾沃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich于1210年出生在波兰吉喬福斯吉Київ时，他的父亲Michael of Chernigov31岁，母亲Olena Maria Romanova16岁。他和Princess Anna of Hungary至少有5个儿子和8个女儿。他去世于1264年在匈牙利享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mikhailovich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian Mihailović and Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ). Compare Mihalovich .

variants.name: Mihajlovic
meanings: Serbian and Croatian (Mihajlović): patronymic from the especially Serbian personal name Mihajlo, an equivalent of Michael . Compare Mihailovich and Mihalovich .

nameMeanings.name: Rostislav
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Mongolian Tatars devastated the country. Their presence, which lasted a year, halted development for at least a century. After the warfare with the Hungarians, the Tatars did not continue towards the west.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich was born in 1210, in Kyiv, Kyiv, Poland, his father, Michael of Chernigov, was 31 and his mother, Olena Maria Romanova, was 16. He had at least 5 sons and 8 daughters with Princess Anna of Hungary. He died in 1264, in Hungary, at the age of 54.

et.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich

fr.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich est né en 1210, à Kyyiv, kijowskie, Pologne, son père, Michael of Chernigov, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Olena Maria Romanova, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles avec Princess Anna of Hungary. Il est décédé en 1264, à Hongrie, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich 1210 in Kiew, Woiwodschaft Kiew, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael of Chernigov 31 und seine Mutter Olena Maria Romanova 16. Er hatte mit Princess Anna of Hungary mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1264 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ungarn.

it.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich
it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich è nato il nel 1210 nel Kyyiv, kijowskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Michael of Chernigov, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Olena Maria Romanova, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie con Princess Anna of Hungary. Morì nel 1264, nel Ungheria, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Rostislav Mikhailovichが1210年にポーランドキジョウスキКиївで生まれた時，父Michael of Chernigovは31歳，母Olena Maria Romanovaは16歳であった。彼はPrincess Anna of Hungaryとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年にハンガリーで54歳で死去した。

ko.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ
ko.lifeSummary: Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich(이)가 1210년 폴란드 키조우스키 Київ에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael of Chernigov(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Olena Maria Romanova(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Princess Anna of Hungary(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 헝가리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich nasceu em 1210, em Kyyiv, kijowskie, Polônia, seu pai, Michael of Chernigov, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Olena Maria Romanova, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas com Princess Anna of Hungary. Ele faleceu em 1264, em Hungria, com 54 anos.

ru.Kiev, Kiev, Empire russe: Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich родился в 1210 г. в местности Киев, Киевское воеводство, Польша, его отцу по имени Michael of Chernigov было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Olena Maria Romanova, 16. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Princess Anna of Hungary. Он умер в 1264 г. в местности Венгрия в возрасте 54 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas con Princess Anna of Hungary. Murió en 1264, en Hungría, a la edad de 54 años.
